title: Faces of mild inconvenience
description: This is my take at the famous "faces of horror" mod
body:
![TITLECARD](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/57ff09cb4a8ad3e9777d032e552e805f98793756.png)

This is my attempt at making the infamous "faces of horror" mod. It works in very similar way with a few differences; Mainly that the faces don't freeze you and don't move. And Most importantly It's client side only.

The mod is more aimed at making you question everything around you rather than full-on jumpscaring you (although that has entered my mind). It's best used alongside other horror mods for additional atmospheric immersiveness.  

You can now also dynamically update the types of faces you want by adding/removing them to/from the "faces" folder in fohclient:

![just like so](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab13f4f4dd9058fe451e4a3283527f8620d7f99a.png)

After you do your changes press F3+T to reload the textures.
